sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position and trail
seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

print("=== Player area (rows 28-42, cols 8-35) ===")
for i in range(28, min(43, len(ascii_lines))):
    print(f"  row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][8:36]}")

print("\n=== Player object ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M' and n['pixels'] == 18:
        bnd = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in bnd)
        print(f"  id={n['id']} top_row={min_r} bnd={bnd}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
